'''竏營-zh-z-v''' ('''kazazhzevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chair|chair]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chair|chair]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-zh-z-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazazhzevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizazhzevoko|thizazhzevoko]] || [[word:jizazhzevoko|jizazhzevoko]] || [[word:shizazhzevoko|shizazhzevoko]] || [[word:kizazhzevoko|kizazhzevoko]]
|-
